name: algomim
description: Delegate bounded tasks to Algomim for an independent second opinion.

interface.shortDescription: Get a second opinion from Algomim.
interface.longDescription: Delegate a bounded technical, design, or research task to the Algomim model and compare its independent response with your current approach.
